title: Coverage Planning

frontmatter.title: Coverage Planning
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of planning network coverage — selecting bands and propagation models, computing footprints, and choosing sites that maximize served population and POI value under budget.

body:
# Skill · Coverage Planning

A growth competency: the agent can turn a coverage goal into a defensible plan — choosing bands and
propagation models, computing and scoring footprints, and selecting sites that maximize served value
against population and POI density under budget.

## Conferred by
- [GROW-101](../schools/growth-planning/departments/coverage-planning/courses/grow-101.md)
- [GROW-220](../schools/growth-planning/departments/coverage-planning/courses/grow-220.md)

## Examined by
[Growth & Planning Exam](../benchmarks/grow-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Growth & Planning — Silver](../certifications/growth-planning-silver.md). Mirrors the
coverage-quality dimension of the agun.ai `EvaluationScores`.

Part of the [School of Growth & Planning](../schools/growth-planning/index.md).
